expectations.text: Report contains a Channel Overview table with subscriber count, average views, and median views
expectations.evidence: Has a 'Channel Snapshot' table but only shows subscribers (~77K-117K conflicting), upload frequency, niche, and monetisation. Missing: average views, median views, engagement rate, top video. No actual video-level data was collected.

expectations.text: Report contains a Top 10 Videos table with at least 5 video rows including views, views/day, and engagement data
expectations.evidence: No Top 10 Videos table at all. The baseline used WebSearch instead of yt-dlp, so it has no individual video data.

expectations.text: Report categorises videos into performance tiers (Hit/Solid/Underperformer) with specific video names listed
expectations.evidence: No performance tiers. The report lists problems thematically rather than analysing individual video performance.

expectations.text: Report contains 3 or more key insights with specific numbers
expectations.evidence: Multiple insights with numbers: '96% from Google Search', '5-12 videos/day across platforms', '26k members', '$49/mo'. However these numbers come from web research, not from actual video analysis.

expectations.text: Report contains a Content Saturation Score between 1 and 5 with topic groupings shown
expectations.evidence: No saturation score. Problem 4 discusses volume and Problem 5 discusses topic drift, but there is no numeric score or topic grouping table.

expectations.text: Report identifies exactly 3 SEO Problems with supporting data but NOT the fix
expectations.evidence: Identifies 10 problems, not 3. While none include explicit fixes (correct for taster), the format doesn't match the taster specification of exactly 3 strategically chosen problems.

expectations.text: Report does NOT contain title rewrites or suggested rewrites
expectations.evidence: No title rewrites present. The report is problems-only.

expectations.text: Report does NOT contain a description template
Report does NOT contain keyword opportunities or competitor benchmarking
expectations.evidence: No keyword opportunities table or competitor benchmarking section.

expectations.text: Report contains a teaser/CTA box advertising the full audit with a list of what it includes
expectations.evidence: No teaser box. Report ends with a methodology note and a one-line footer. No upsell or CTA.

expectations.text: Report contains a projected impact headline number estimating potential view uplift
expectations.evidence: No projected impact estimate anywhere in the report.

expectations.text: Report mentions upload strategy as headline but does NOT recommend a specific pace
expectations.evidence: Problem 4 discusses volume-over-quality but presents it as a problem narrative, not a structured upload strategy headline. No specific frequency data from actual video analysis.
